technical: Coding Club — competitive programming, hackathons, open source
Robotics Club — builds robots for national competitions
IEEE Student Branch — technical talks, workshops, paper presentations
AI/ML Club — machine learning projects and workshops
Cybersecurity Club — CTF competitions and ethical hacking workshops
Web Development Club — full-stack projects and freelancing guidance
cultural: Music Club — band performances and college events
Dance Club — classical and western dance performances
Photography Club — campus events and competitions
Literary Club — debates, quizzes, creative writing
social: NSS (National Service Scheme) — community service activities
NCC — National Cadet Corps unit available
Entrepreneurship Cell (E-Cell) — startup mentoring and competitions

technical_fest.name: TechVIT
technical_fest.description: College's flagship technical festival with hackathons, coding competitions, robotics events, and guest lectures from industry experts

cultural_fest.name: Viva
cultural_fest.description: Annual cultural festival with music, dance, drama, fashion show, and celebrity performances

sports_meet.name: Spardha
sports_meet.description: Inter-college sports tournament with cricket, football, basketball, badminton, and athletics

events.hackathons: Multiple hackathons organized throughout the year, including 24-hour and 48-hour formats
events.workshops: Regular industry workshops on emerging technologies like AI, cloud computing, IoT, and blockchain

sports.gym: Fully equipped gymnasium with modern equipment, open 6 AM to 9 PM
sports.achievements: College teams regularly participate in inter-university tournaments under Savitribai Phule Pune University

library.digital: Access to IEEE Xplore, Springer, and NPTEL digital libraries
library.timing: 8 AM to 8 PM, Monday to Saturday

infrastructure.labs: State-of-the-art computer labs with 500+ systems, all with high-speed internet

cafeteria.options: Multiple food stalls with North Indian, South Indian, Chinese, and fast food options

infrastructure.auditorium: 1200-seat air-conditioned auditorium for events and seminars
infrastructure.seminar_halls: Multiple seminar halls with projectors and audio systems
infrastructure.medical: On-campus medical room with a doctor available on working days

transportation.college_bus: College bus service available from major areas in Pune including Swargate, Katraj, Hadapsar, Kothrud, Wakad, and Hinjewadi
transportation.bus_pass: Semester bus pass available at subsidized rates
transportation.nearest_metro: Nearest metro station: 2 km from campus
transportation.auto_rickshaw: Auto rickshaws and cabs easily available near campus gate

campus_timing: 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Saturday. Hostel students have 24x7 campus access.
internet: Campus-wide Wi-Fi with 1 Gbps internet connectivity

coding_culture.description: VIT Pune has a strong coding culture. Many students participate in competitive programming on Codeforces, LeetCode, and HackerRank.
coding_culture.achievements: Students have cleared Google, Microsoft, and Amazon interviews. Multiple students selected for FAANG companies.
coding_culture.open_source: Active open source contribution culture. Students contribute to GitHub projects.
coding_culture.startups: Several student startups have emerged from the college, supported by the E-Cell.

innovation.incubation: College has a startup incubation center supporting student entrepreneurs
innovation.research: Students can participate in funded research projects under faculty guidance
innovation.patents: Students have filed patents in areas of IoT, AI, and renewable energy
